overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school video game showing a player character standing in a grand, candlelit hall with gothic stone architecture. Other student NPCs walk through the space while the camera remains stationary, capturing the warm ambient lighting and detailed medieval interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic hall with central statue and candlelight

agents.ego_description: standing still near the edge of the grand hall, watching other students walk through the central area toward the statue

notable_agents.action: student in dark wizard robes walking from right to left across the foreground
small student walking toward the central statue fountain in the middle of the hall

entered.detail: large ornate stone statue on a raised circular pedestal in the center of the hall
tall stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
tall candelabra with multiple lit candles providing warm ambient light
high vaulted ceiling with intricate stone carvings and hanging house banners
vertical banners suspended from the ceiling displaying house colors

segments.scene_description: The player character stands stationary in a grand gothic hall illuminated by candlelight, with a large central statue fountain as the focal point. Other students in wizard robes walk through the space in various directions, passing between stone pillars and under hanging banners while the warm lighting casts long shadows across the patterned marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective within a grand gothic hall, maintaining a focused gaze on the atmospheric interplay of light and movement. It begins with the player character standing still, centered against the backdrop of a large statue fountain that serves as the room's focal point. As students in wizard robes drift through the space, they weave between massive stone pillars and beneath hanging banners, their movement adding life to the stillness. The scene then emphasizes the warm candlelight as it casts long, shifting shadows across the intricate patterns of the marble floor. Finally, the camera lingers on the detailed medieval architecture, anchoring the viewer in the ambient glow of the hall.
